message:
fix(output): implement explicit Default for TokenEstimator

Fixes token estimation returning usize::MAX by replacing #[derive(Default)]
with an explicit Default implementation that initializes chars_per_token to 4.0
instead of 0.0 (which caused division by zero).

Also improves test reliability:
- Enhanced cgroup error handling to skip tests on permission issues
- Added --sample-size flags to remaining e2e tests for faster execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
